<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get Marketplace Plugin"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/marketplace/plugins/{name}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get a single plugin manifest by name.

Returns 404 if the plugin is not found in the marketplace.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
